productDecision.decision: FLOW-17 freelancer-marketplace is eligible to proceed into Docker/Vault auth and fork cascade certification after repairing the inherited portability defects in its four service files. It is a dual-sided marketplace flow and must preserve client, freelancer, business-partner, tenant-admin, and platform-support role boundaries during the cascade.

baselineBeforeRepair.verdict: tests passed but portability source scan blocked phase close

repairSummary.fix: Replaced direct nestjs-cls injection in FLOW-17 services with TenantContextResolver, added MicroserviceBase descriptors for service ids T613 through T616, and updated direct constructor tests to provide the resolver contract.

commands: server: npx jest --testPathPatterns=freelancer-marketplace --runInBand --colors=false - baseline passed, scan blocked
FLOW-17 source scan before repair: servicesMissingMicroserviceBase=4, clsImports=4, directTenantContextImports=8
Edited four FLOW-17 services to extend MicroserviceBase and use TenantContextResolver.
server: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false - passed
server: npx jest --testPathPatterns=freelancer-marketplace --runInBand --colors=false - passed, 8 suites/89 tests
